title: More & More Enchantments
description:
This mod adds new Enchantements like 
autosmelt and Hammer
body:
More & More Enchantments

This mod adds New Enchantments Like Auto Smelt, Unbreakable, Hammer and Overworld Bookshelf
Donwload it if u want new enchantments that adds new cool Features Disclamer This mod is in early development, So if there are any bugs join my discord Here What The Enchantment Are Doing: Auto Smelt:
It Smelts items when brocken with a pickaxe or axe
(Can't Be used With Hammer Because of a bug) Hammer:
Destroyes Blocks in 3x3
(Can't Be used With Auto Smelt Because of a bug) Haste
Haste has 3 Levels
The higher The Level higher the haste Level Strength
Strength has 3 levels
The higher The Level higher the strength Level
